case_title: CARE FOR SENIORS (REYKHEL, BORIS) VS MAGNUSEN, AUDREY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARE FOR SENIORS (REYKHEL, BORIS) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGNUSEN, AUDREY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $397.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,397.00, PLAINTIFF OBJECTS TO DEFENDANT'S LATE REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT INFORMED OF DEFENDANT'S REQUEST PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE OF 11-15-05. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT PROCEEDED IN THE DEFENDANT'S ABSENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
AMENDED FINANCIAL STATEMENT FILED BY DEFT, AUDREY MAGNUSEN.
CASE IS TO BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM NOT 1:30 PM ON SEPT. 11, 2006 TOGETHER WITH THE OEX CALENDAR.
MOTION TO CONTINUE OEX HEARING WAS OFF CALENDAR AND OEX ORDERED DISCHARGED. DEFT APPEARED, NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF. DEFT TO CONTINUE PAYING
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY AUDREY MAGNUSEN BY FAX RE 11/15/05 1:30PM TRIAL.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-04-2006, DENIED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MAGNUSEN, AUDREY HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THIS IS ACTUALLY THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO CONTINUE CASE FOR FURTHER HEARING AND DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION.
$100 PER MONTH AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED.
COPY OF ORDER SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARE FOR SENIORS (REYKHEL, BORIS) AS TO DEFENDANT MAGNUSEN, AUDREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO ADREY MAGNUSEN- ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
CASE CON'T TO 9/11/06 @ 11:00 AM FOR FURTHER HEARING AND FOR DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION.
THIS CASE IS ACTUALLY TO BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM ON FEB. 5, 2007 TOGETHER WITH THE ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION CALENDAR.
COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS. BANKRUPTCY FILED ON 8/14/09.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-12-2006, GRANTED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS CONTINUED FROM MAR-22-2006 TO JUL-12-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FURTHER EXAMINE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARE FOR SENIORS (REYKHEL, BORIS) HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FURTHER EXAMINE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR CONTINUED FROM SEP-11-2006 TO FEB-05-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COURT ORDER AFTER THE DEBTOR'S EXAMINATION HEARING: MONTHLY PAYMENTS INCREASED TO $100/MO. EFFECTIVE 11/1/06. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FURTHER EXAMINE JUDGEMENT DEBTOR OF FEB-05-2007, OFF CALENDAR
CORRESPONDENCE FROM U.S. BANKRUPTCY COURT, FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAGNUSEN, AUDREY
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY FAX FROM DEFT AUDREY MAGNUSEN RE CONT OF HRG DATE OF NOV 15, 2005.
MOTION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAGNUSEN, AUDREY HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT GRANTED: DEFT TO PAY PLFT $50 PER/MO COMMENCING 4/1/06 & $50 ON 1ST OF EACH MONTH UNTIL 7/12/06. CON'T FOR FURTHER HEARING.
